getHealthFactor(address).details: Calculate health factor for a user Health Factor = (Collateral * 100) / (Borrowed * LTV) HF > 1 = Safe, HF < 1 = Liquidatable

getMaxBorrow(address).details: Calculate maximum borrow amount for a user

isLiquidatable(address).details: Check if a user is liquidatable (health factor < 1)
